name: Trace Moe
tagline: Identify an anime scene from an image URL
description: Search trace.moe with a publicly reachable screenshot URL and return likely anime, episode, and timestamp matches.

auth.hint: No authentication is required for ordinary public searches; optional account limits are outside this candidate.

tools.name: search_scene
tools.description: Identify an anime scene from a remotely hosted screenshot URL.

params.name: url
params.description: URL-encoded, publicly reachable screenshot image URL.

params.name: anilistInfo
params.description: Include AniList title and metadata when true.

params.name: cutBorders
params.description: Crop likely black borders before matching.
